name: PT Map Aktif Adiperkasa Tbk
summary: PT Map Aktif Adiperkasa Tbk operates as a sporting goods retailer in Indonesia. It operates sports, leisure footwear, and kid's stores that sell athletic shoes, apparel, sports equipment, leisure footwear, apparel, accessories, kids wear, toys, and early education tools. The company's brand portfolio includes Planet Sports, Sports Station, Royal Sporting House, Golf House, OGAAN, Kidz Station, and Planet Sports Kids. It sells its products through approximately 1,173 retail stores in 76 cities, as well as through 6 digital stores. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Map Aktif Adiperkasa Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Mitra Adiperkasa Tbk.
